Manages touch input events, defines handling and event structures, and dispatches events to handlers.


## Files
- **[touch.c](touch.c.md)**: Manages touch input events, including initialization, event handling, and state management.
- **[touch.h](touch.h.md)**: Defines touch input handling, including initialization, updates, and driver event management.
- **[touch_client.h](touch_client.h.md)**: Defines a touch event handler and a function to dispatch touch events to a specified handler.
- **[touch_event.h](touch_event.h.md)**: Defines data structures for touch events, including types and properties like position and pressure.
